case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS CORRAL, GAMALIEL

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CORRAL, GAMALIEL

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT CORRAL, GAMALIEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-17-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CORRAL, GAMALIEL $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $31.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,031.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO GAMALIEL CORRAL RETURNED--ATTEMPTED, NOT KNOWN; MOVED
